name: ejentum
description: Ejentum MCP server. Eight tools (four dynamic: reasoning, code, anti-deception, memory; four adaptive: adaptive-reasoning, adaptive-code, adaptive-anti-deception, adaptive-memory) that retrieve task-matched cognitive operations from a library of 679. Each operation is a structured procedure (numbered steps + failure pattern + falsification test) paired with an executable reasoning topology (a DAG with decision gates, parallel branches, bounded loops, meta-cognitive exits). Adaptive tools require Go or Super tier. Two install paths: stdio via `npx -y ejentum-mcp` or hosted HTTPS at https://api.ejentum.com/mcp.
